title: Floral Wreath Cookie Cutter M Size | 3D Printed Food Safe PLA | Spring Baking Tool | Flower Cookie Mold | Kitchen Utensil
description:
Create stunning floral wreath cookies with this beautifully designed 3D-printed cookie cutter! Perfect for spring celebrations, Mother's Day, Easter, weddings, or any occasion that calls for elegant flower-themed treats. This medium-sized cutter produces detailed cookie shapes that will impress your family, friends, and customers.

Our floral wreath cookie cutter features intricate petal details and graceful curves that transfer beautifully to your cookie dough. The raised edges ensure clean, precise cuts every time, while the comfortable grip makes extended baking sessions enjoyable. The thoughtful design allows for easy dough release, preventing sticking and maintaining the delicate floral pattern.

This medium size cutter measures approximately 7-8cm in diameter, making it ideal for standard cookies that aren't too large or too small. The perfect size for decorated sugar cookies, shortbread, or any firm cookie dough that holds its shape well during baking.

To use, simply roll your cookie dough to your desired thickness (typically 1/4 to 1/2 inch), press the cutter firmly and evenly into the dough, then lift carefully to preserve the beautiful wreath shape. For best results, chill your dough beforehand and dust the cutter lightly with flour if needed.

Printed in food-safe PLA. Hand wash only – not dishwasher safe. Do not use in microwave or oven. Clean gently with warm soapy water and dry thoroughly before storing.

This floral wreath cookie cutter makes an exceptional gift for baking enthusiasts, professional decorators, or anyone who loves creating beautiful homemade treats. Perfect for Mother's Day gifts, housewarming presents, bridal shower favors, or birthday surprises for the baker in your life. Teachers, neighbors, and crafting friends will appreciate this thoughtful and practical gift that keeps giving with every batch of cookies. It's also wonderful for building your own baking tool collection or starting someone else's journey into decorated cookie artistry.

About our shop: We specialize in high-quality, handmade 3D-printed baking tools created in small batches with attention to detail. Each item is printed to order using premium materials, ensuring you receive a fresh, perfectly crafted product. We offer reliable shipping to both US and EU customers with careful packaging to ensure your items arrive safely.
